specs.title: AC-1: Shipper views carrier performance profile
AC-2: Benchmark comparison displays correctly
AC-3: Carrier interest count displays social proof
AC-4: Multi-tenancy isolation message displays
Service areas and equipment types display
Shipper can add carrier to preferred list from profile
Profile styling complies with Style Guide (colors, typography)
Profile is accessible (keyboard navigation)
Profile loads within 2 seconds (performance)
should save cost profile and persist after reload (US-757 AC-1)
